name: Fu Orostor
description:
After a while, it is done!! Behold! Fu our king!!

Fu Orostor (フウ・オロストル, Fū Orosutoru) is a character in Gachiakuta. He's a former rookie member of the Raiders and currently working with the Cleaners on a trial basis.

Due to his actions, Fu is a supporting antagonist in the Trash Storm Arc before becoming an ally.
creator: Realixy
